title: Present simple: I do, I don't, Do I?
explanation:
Present simple — I / you / we / they

Use the present simple for habits, facts and routines.

  • Affirmative: I work, you work, we work, they work
  • Negative: I don't work (do not)
  • Question: Do you work?

Remember: after do / don't / does / doesn't use the base verb (work, not works).

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option to complete the sentences.

questions.feedback: Negative present simple: don't + base verb.
With they we use the base form live.
Questions with I/you/we/they start with Do.

questions.text: We [*don't watch|doesn't watch|not watch] TV in the morning.

questions.feedback: They → Do at the start of the question.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: She ____ tennis every week. | *plays | play | playing
I ____ coffee. | *don't like | doesn't like | not like

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option to complete the sentences.

questions.text: I [*get up|gets up|getting up] at seven o'clock.

questions.feedback: After doesn't use base verb eat.

questions.text: — Do you eat meat? — Yes, I [*do|does|am].

questions.feedback: After don't use the base verb know.
